name: ci-err-module-not-found-is-cache
hook: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for @/ aliases in CI = stale cache, not code
body: When CI fails with `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` for path aliases like `@/infra/...` but tests pass locally, this is a CI cache inconsistency — not a code bug. The `vite-tsconfig-paths` plugin correctly resolves aliases (verified locally). The CI environment has a stale `node_modules` that doesn't match the lockfile. Solution: invalidate CI cache for the workflow.
why: Spent time investigating whether vite-tsconfig-paths or tsconfig had regressed, when the real issue was CI cache state.
